creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just a few stragglers left over after the bind removal.

in src/etc/mtree/BSD.usr.dist:

	share
	..
		doc
		..
			bind9
				arm
				..
				misc
				..

Fix: 

Those paths are already listed in ObsoleteFiles.inc but they could
probably stand to be removed from the mtree as well.
